steps.title: Find the contextual signal
steps.content: The argument: the public's understanding of history is central to political comprehension; for an electorate to function, history can't be locked away with academics. So in the blank, history must be too important to leave to historians alone.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
"Critical" here means crucially important — exactly the strength the argument calls for.

(A) "accessible" goes the wrong direction. (B) "complex" would suggest only experts should handle it — opposite of the point. (D) "respectable" doesn't fit the urgency.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
